title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

Fueled by the flames of their ambition, many
racers put everything at stake for this race—the
Japanese Derby is here.
Clunk, clunk!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eeeeek?! She's here?!
Clank!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
It's n-n-nice to see you, Ayabe. I look f-fr-froward
to our race today...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Watch me.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Watch me. I'm going to win.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'll give you that star... no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: T-T-Trainer. Ayabe... isn't even looking at me.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Today, Ayabe is... she's...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I race for my other self.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
For my younger sister... the one I lost on the day
we were born.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
She's going to run for her departed sister. In this
once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe has come this far carrying such a heavy
weight... Can somebody like me really compete?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh, what do you—
choice_data_list: You're all equals once the gates open.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Equals... You might be right... Errrgh.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
My legs are still shaking... It's like they've
stopped listening to me.

Beneath the somber pressure of Admire Vega's
weighty motivation, how far can Doto go? I'll
have to watch and see.
